items.title: Bones of St Francis of Assisi go on public display in Italy
items.dek: The remains of Italy's patron saint have only been seen in public once before - for one day in 1978.
items.body: The remains of Italy's patron saint have only been seen in public once before - for one day in 1978.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Greenland says 'no thanks' to Trump US hospital boat
items.dek: Greenland's PM reminded Trump of its free healthcare, after Trump said he was sending a boat to aid people who were allegedly "not being taken care of".
items.body: Greenland's PM reminded Trump of its free healthcare, after Trump said he was sending a boat to aid people who were allegedly "not being taken care of".
items.author: IriLine Desk
